question: How does the app work.
answer: The Qwantu app automatically captures your expenses and allows you to accurately track your spending and budgets. It also tracks key insights on your spending that allow you to make informed decisions regarding your expenses.

question: Is my data safe?
answer: All your data is stored securely on your device and no data is ever shared or accessed by us or third-parties. Please review our privacy policy for more info.

question: How can I send feedback?
answer: You can send feedback down below or long pressing the '?' button on the app. You can also leave a review on play store if you're interested.

question: Can I refund my account?
answer: If you want to delete your account and request a refund you can do so within five (5) days of your account purchase, by going to your profile and going to advanced options. You can also get a full refund without deleting your account via invites.

question: How can I get a full refund via invites?
answer: Opt into our invites refund program (optional) and get and invite code that you can share with your friends, once they setup their accounts with your invite code, you're credited with an invite. Once you maintain enough invites you are eligible to claim a full refund.

question: Do I have to get an invite code?
answer: The app is fully functional without opting into our invites refund program and you don't have to opt in for any functionality. Only opt in if you're interested.

question: What if an Error occurs?
answer: Try restarting the app or Send feedback via the app or this website describing the issue. We are actively working to make the app better for all users.
